CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Planetary Audio Shard - Distributed TTS Cache
--------------------------------------------------------

"Good news, everyone! My voice can now echo across the planetary network!"

This module implements distributed caching for TTS audio files, allowing
cosmos instances to share pre-generated 

CLASSES:
- AudioScope(Enum)
- AudioMetadata: Metadata for a cached audio file (shareable across P2P).

- PlanetaryAudioShard: Distributed audio cache for TTS voice cloning.
